title: Healifty Christmas Wreath Candle Rings Holly Berry Candle Ring Artificial Red Berries Pine Needles Wreath for Christmas Garland Decoration Ornaments, Style 1
features: 【11cm Inner Diameter Candle Rings Wreaths】Specifically designed with 11cm inner diameter to perfectly fit most standard pillar candles. This christmas wreath centrepiece features realistic pomegranates and pine needles arrangement for immediate festive elegance.

【Premium Artificial Garland Construction】Crafted from plastic, foam and iron wire with lifelike botanical details. This artificial garland maintains its shape season after season without fading or shedding

【Versatile Wreath Centrepiece Application】Functions equally beautifully as wreath centrepiece for tables or wall decoration for mantels. The balanced design creates stunning visual impact from every angle when used as front door decoration

【Multi-Scene Holiday Display Solution】Perfect as wreath hanger for front door arrangements, flower garland decoration for staircases, or accent piece for holiday tables. The versatile garland adapts to various Christmas styling needs

【Complete Ready-to-Display Decor】Arrives fully assembled for immediate use. This elaborate christmas wreath centrepiece requires no additional accessories - simply place around candles or hang for instant Christmas transformation
description: Product Description Flower Garland Decoration Product Size Inner diameter: 11cm/4.3in Overall diameter: 20cm/7.86in Material Foam, PVC Artificial Garland Product Details This christmas wreath centrepiece features realistic pomegranates and pine needles arrangement for immediate festive elegance.
